mapper.select:
SELECT teaching_materials.id AS materialId, teaching_materials.name AS materialName, CASE WHEN materials_textbook_mapping.chapter_id IS NOT NULL THEN materials_textbook_mapping.textbook_id ELSE NULL END AS textbookId, CASE WHEN materials_textbook_mapping.chapter_id IS NOT NULL THEN textbook.textbook_name ELSE NULL END AS textbookName FROM teaching_materials LEFT JOIN materials_textbook_mapping ON teaching_materials.id = materials_textbook_mapping.material_id LEFT JOIN textbook ON materials_textbook_mapping.textbook_id = textbook.id WHERE teaching_materials.id IN
#{id}
